2118840.name: The Dancer: Definitive Edition - Revolution DLC
2118840.description:
Catch the first train outta there in this all-new Dancer Adventure. DLC Includes a new application (accessed from the launch options) that serves as a prequel chapter to The Dancer: Definitive Edition, being set before chapter 1.

Features

  • Fend off the Dancers in an all-new location!
  • A ~20 Minute Story chapter
  • Supports the developer!

If you liked the Dancer, you'll like this too! (hopefully)

Have fun!
- Spacepiano :D
2118840.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
